name: The Whispering Grimoire
description: Read the hidden passcode on a blank page by crashing the book's Truth-Ward logic.

flaws.name: Project Illusion
flaws.flavor_text: Invoke the Illusion-Glyph to project fake, superficial text onto the pages.

flaws.name: Activate Silence Seal
flaws.flavor_text: Apply the Silence-Seal to mute the voice of the Illusion-Glyph, making it a silent lie.

flaws.name: Trigger Truth Ward
flaws.flavor_text: Force the Truth-Ward to evaluate the silenced glyph. It detects a silent lie, attacks it, and crashes the grimoire logic.
